title: Life Succubus feat. Halos1
lyrics: Victim of the streets and a victim of my choices Turn to these drugs, now these drugs turn to poisons Voices hoarse, I can hardly speak And I haven't bathed in about 8 weeks And they don't face me I'm addicted, I'm breathing deep On my knees, I'm neglected Snorting speed on my knees, gotta feel helpless Spying is chameleon without purpose Blitz my epidermis, it's fucking hurt From these many colors that I've been turning And that's hopelessness Soaks in skin, I struggle towards the top like dorsal fins Atrocious sins within the dope I spend Longing for something to leave me extinct Yet I remain such an absence of me Possessed by these deeds and this high that I chase This high that I hate, high I'm so high I just wanna deflate I wanna feel safe, I loathe how this succubus calls me a maid I try to digress, but don't need to break Addict at least as a lead No doubt's my most dominant trait I slowly decay No colors no longer, I only see gray Somebody show me the way Don't save me a place with a brimstone in hell I need help from myself, can you tell? Don't save me a place with a brimstone in hell I need help from myself, can you tell? I can't tell Don't save me a place with a brimstone in hell I need help from myself, can you tell? Victim of the streets and a victim of my choices Turn to these drugs, now these drugs turn to poisons Voices, voice, I can hardly speak And I have been bathed in about a week But it don't phase me, I'm a different breed Indeed, all my needs are neglected Snorts me, all my needs Gotta feel helpless Gotta feel helpless I'm on my knees, I'm so unsteady I'm doing everything you told me not to do I knew you were right, I knew I was wrong But I still said, fuck that, I'm gone So come back to me, Succubus And make me the way you thought I should be I need help with me Come back, Succubus Please come back I need help with me The me inside of me Victim of the streets and a victim of my choices Turn to these drugs, now these drugs turn to poisons Voices, voice, I can hardly speak And I have been bathed in about a week But it don't phase me, I'm a different breed Indeed, all my needs are neglected Snorts me, all my needs Gotta feel helpless Gotta feel helpless Victim of the streets and a victim of my choices Turn to these drugs, now these drugs turn to poison Voices, voice, I can hardly speak And I have been bathed in about a week But it don't phase me, I'm a different breed Indeed, all my needs are neglected Snorts me, all my needs Gotta feel helpless Gotta feel helpless 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

lyricsSegments.text: Victim of the streets and a victim of my choices Turn to these drugs, now these drugs turn to poisons
Voices hoarse, I can hardly speak And I haven't bathed in about 8 weeks
And they don't face me I'm addicted, I'm breathing deep
On my knees, I'm neglected Snorting speed on my knees, gotta feel helpless
Spying is chameleon without purpose Blitz my epidermis, it's fucking hurt
From these many colors that I've been turning And that's hopelessness
Soaks in skin, I struggle towards the top like dorsal fins
Atrocious sins within the dope I spend Longing for something to leave me extinct
Yet I remain such an absence of me Possessed by these deeds and this high that I chase
This high that I hate, high I'm so high I just wanna deflate
I wanna feel safe, I loathe how this succubus calls me a maid
I try to digress, but don't need to break Addict at least as a lead
No doubt's my most dominant trait I slowly decay
No colors no longer, I only see gray Somebody show me the way
Don't save me a place with a brimstone in hell I need help from myself, can you tell?
Don't save me a place with a brimstone in hell I need help from myself, can you tell?
I can't tell
Don't save me a place with a brimstone in hell I need help from myself, can you tell?
Victim of the streets and a victim of my choices Turn to these drugs, now these drugs turn to poisons
Voices, voice, I can hardly speak And I have been bathed in about a week
But it don't phase me, I'm a different breed Indeed, all my needs are neglected
Snorts me, all my needs Gotta feel helpless
Gotta feel helpless
I'm on my knees, I'm so unsteady I'm doing everything you told me not to do
I knew you were right, I knew I was wrong But I still said, fuck that, I'm gone
So come back to me, Succubus And make me the way you thought I should be
I need help with me Come back, Succubus
Please come back I need help with me
The me inside of me
Victim of the streets and a victim of my choices Turn to these drugs, now these drugs turn to poisons
Voices, voice, I can hardly speak And I have been bathed in about a week
But it don't phase me, I'm a different breed Indeed, all my needs are neglected
Snorts me, all my needs Gotta feel helpless
Gotta feel helpless
Victim of the streets and a victim of my choices Turn to these drugs, now these drugs turn to poison
Voices, voice, I can hardly speak And I have been bathed in about a week
But it don't phase me, I'm a different breed Indeed, all my needs are neglected
Snorts me, all my needs Gotta feel helpless
Gotta feel helpless
